data.title: Vietnam's Q1 GDP Growth Exceeds Expectations
data.description: Vietnam's GDP grew by 7.83% year-on-year in the first quarter, surpassing the expected 7.50%, according to Jin10. This growth rate, however, is lower than the previous quarter's 8.46%. The data reflects Vietnam's continued economic expansion, although at a slightly reduced pace compared to the last quarter.

data.title: Vietnam's March Exports Surge by 20% Year-on-Year
data.description: Vietnam's export growth in March reached 20% year-on-year, surpassing expectations of 14.40%, according to Jin10. This marks a significant increase from the previous month's growth rate of 5.70%. The robust performance highlights Vietnam's strengthening position in the global trade market.

data.title: FTX/Alameda Sells Drift Tokens Following $285 Million Theft
data.description: Following a $285 million theft incident at Drift Protocol, FTX/Alameda sold 6.94 million DRIFT tokens, valued at $320,000, through Wintermute six hours ago. Blockchain sleuth EmberCN posted on X. Alameda, an investor in Drift Protocol, had acquired 8.33 million DRIFT tokens a year ago through vesting unlocks, which were valued at $6.22 million at the time. However, the value of these tokens has since decreased to $380,000.

data.title: AI Infrastructure Shift Highlights Storage as Key Asset
data.description:
In the backdrop of the ongoing surge in AI computing power, market attention is subtly shifting from GPUs to a more fundamental bottleneck—storage. According to PANews, the launch of the DRAM ETF marks not just the introduction of a new product but also the first time the capital market has priced 'storage' as an independent asset class.

This article delves into the true significance behind this ETF from three perspectives: industrial logic, capital structure, and market sentiment. It represents a direct reflection of the evolution of AI infrastructure and serves as a crucial entry point for global funds to reallocate towards leading storage companies. Additionally, it may become an important indicator of whether the market has entered a crowded trading phase.

As storage transitions from a 'supporting role' to a 'scarce layer,' the reevaluation of AI core assets may just be beginning.

data.title: US stocks closed mixed in the crypto sector, with TRON rising over 11.37%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the close of trading on the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 0.13%, the S&P 500 rose 0.11%, and the Nasdaq Composite rose 0.18%. The crypto sector was mixed, with SBET falling 4.18%, MSTR falling 2.4%, TRON rising over 11.37%, and MARA rising over 8.33%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Middle East Tensions Impact Oil and Gold Markets, CICC Reports
data.description:
CICC's recent report highlights the impact of the U.S.-Iran conflict on oil prices, noting that the surge in oil prices has heightened inflation risks. According to Jin10, market expectations regarding the Federal Reserve's interest rate cut path have shifted, leading to selling pressure on gold ETFs, which had seen significant increases last year. Additionally, liquidity shocks in the futures and options markets have contributed to short-term corrections.

The current geopolitical situation in the Middle East is at a critical juncture, with oil prices facing potential fluctuations. The gold market's pricing focus may shift towards assessing the impact of supply shocks on economic stagnation, with previously priced-in interest rate hike expectations potentially needing adjustment.

Looking ahead, CICC suggests that whether the geopolitical situation de-escalates leading to an oil price correction, monetary policy returns to a more accommodative stance, or supply shocks exacerbate recession pressures, highlighting gold's safe-haven value, there may be room for upward adjustments in gold investment demand and prices.

data.title: Circle Mints Additional USDC on Solana Network
data.description: Circle has minted an additional 250 million USDC on the Solana network. According to ChainCatcher, this brings the total amount minted over the past month to 10.25 billion USDC.

data.title: FTX sold 6.94 million DRIFTs through Windemute, worth approximately $320,000.
data.description: According to crypto analyst EmberCN, following the approximately $285 million security incident at Drift Protocol, FTX/Alameda sold 6.94 million DRIFT tokens via Wintermute six hours ago, worth about $320,000. Data shows that Alameda, as an investor, previously acquired approximately 8.33 million DRIFT tokens through vesting unlocks, initially worth about $6.22 million; their current value has decreased to approximately $380,000.

data.title: The address associated with Erik Voorhees purchased another 431.8 ETH, bringing his total holdings to over 122,000 ETH.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a wallet address associated with Erik Voorhees spent approximately $887,900 USDT to purchase 431.8 ETH five hours ago. Previously, this address had accumulated purchases of 122,355 ETH, worth approximately $264 million.

data.title: Erik Voorhees-Linked Wallet Makes Significant Ethereum Purchase
data.description: A wallet associated with Erik Voorhees has made another substantial Ethereum purchase. According to Odaily, the wallet spent approximately $887,900 USDT to acquire 431.8 ETH five hours ago. Previously, this wallet had accumulated a total of 122,355 ETH.

data.title: Crypto Startups Secure Nearly $5 Billion in Q1 2026 Funding
data.description:
Crypto startups raised nearly $5 billion in the first quarter of 2026, marking a 16% year-on-year decline, according to ChainCatcher. Despite the decrease, the investment landscape is evolving, with funds shifting from speculative tokens to practical sectors like payment and trading infrastructure. Prediction markets led the way with over $1.7 billion in funding, while payment and trading infrastructure attracted $735 million and $423 million, respectively. Major non-crypto institutions such as Sequoia Capital, Founders Fund, Bain Capital, and Alibaba are increasingly entering the space.

The top ten funding projects in Q1 include:

- Kalshi: $1 billion, valued at $22 billion, led by Coatue Management, a CFTC-regulated prediction market leader.

- Polymarket: $600 million, funded by Intercontinental Exchange (ICE), a leading decentralized prediction market platform.

- Rain: $250 million in Series C, valued at nearly $2 billion, led by Iconiq Capital, focusing on stablecoin payment infrastructure.

- BitGo: $213 million, New York Stock Exchange IPO, valued at over $2 billion, a crypto custody institution.

- Flying Tulip: $206 million, public token sale, led by DeFi architect Andre Cronje, integrating trading, lending, and insurance.

- Whop: $200 million, backed by Tether.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | SPDR Gold Trust Holdings Remain Steady at 1,050.99 Tons
data.description: The SPDR Gold Trust, recognized as the world's largest gold exchange-traded fund (ETF), reported that its holdings remained unchanged at 1,050.99 tons. According to Jin10, this stability in holdings reflects the current market conditions for gold. The SPDR Gold Trust is a key indicator of investor sentiment in the precious metals market, and its holdings are closely monitored by market participants. The unchanged status suggests a period of consolidation in the gold market, as investors assess economic conditions and potential impacts on gold prices.

data.title: Ethereum Proposal EIP-8141 Aims to Enhance Protocol Flexibility
data.description: Ethereum Improvement Proposal EIP-8141 seeks to integrate account abstraction, gas payment, and signature flexibility directly into the protocol layer. According to PANews, this proposal represents an effort to streamline and enhance the Ethereum network's functionality by embedding these features at a fundamental level. The initiative is part of ongoing developments to improve the efficiency and user experience of the Ethereum blockchain.

data.title: Significant Bitcoin Transfer Between Anonymous Addresses
data.description: A substantial Bitcoin transaction has been reported involving two anonymous addresses. According to ChainCatcher, at 07:58, a total of 355.18 BTC was transferred from one anonymous address, starting with bc1qdrktg, to another, beginning with 348zymQ. This transaction highlights ongoing activity within the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Latest US intelligence suggests that Iran is unlikely to open the Strait of Hormuz in the short term.
data.description: Three sources said that U.S. intelligence agencies warned that Iran is unlikely to ease its control over the Strait of Hormuz in the near future. (Jinshi)

data.title: Chainlink-related addresses transferred 2.5 million LINK tokens, worth approximately $21.65 million, to Binance.
data.description: According to crypto analyst Ai (@ai_9684xtpa), three addresses with non-circulating Chainlink supply transferred a total of 2.5 million LINK tokens, worth approximately $21.65 million, to Binance in the past four hours.

data.title: Polymarket Account Makes $340,000 Bet on Philadelphia 76ers
data.description: A Polymarket account, which has accumulated over $1.5 million in profit, placed a $340,000 wager on the Philadelphia 76ers to defeat the Minnesota Timberwolves. According to NS3.AI, the Odaily Seer Channel identified this trade after the game had commenced and progressed into the second quarter.

data.title: SpaceX targets an IPO valuation of over $2 trillion, planning to raise up to $75 billion.
data.description: SpaceX has raised its IPO valuation target to over $2 trillion as it prepares to market what could be the largest IPO in history to potential investors. SpaceX's valuation is expected to grow by nearly two-thirds within months. In February, SpaceX acquired Elon Musk's xAI, valuing the combined company at $1.25 trillion. A listing with a valuation exceeding $2 trillion would give SpaceX a market capitalization exceeding all companies in the S&P 500 except Nvidia, Apple, Alphabet, Microsoft, and Amazon, as well as Meta and Tesla. SpaceX has secretly filed for an IPO, with the listing potentially taking place as early as June, and is expected to raise up to $75 billion, far surpassing the previous record of $29 billion set by Saudi Aramco in 2019. The funds raised will be used for space-based AI data centers and lunar factory projects. SpaceX has selected Bank of America, Citigroup, Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan Chase, and Morgan Stanley as lead underwriters for its IPO and plans to hold a conference call with the banking syndicate next Monday, followed by an analyst briefing later in April. Bloomberg Intelligence analysts point out that SpaceX's revenue is projected to reach nearly $20 billion by 2026, with launch operations and Starlink contributing the majority of that revenue.

data.title: High-Stakes Bet on 76ers vs. Timberwolves NBA Game
data.description:
A significant wager has been placed on the NBA regular season game between the Philadelphia 76ers and the Minnesota Timberwolves. According to Odaily, an account with over $1.5 million in profits has invested $340,000 on the 76ers to win, with an average opening price of 6035¢.

The game, which started at 7 a.m. UTC+8, is currently in the second quarter. As the NBA regular season nears its conclusion, the 76ers hold a record of 42 wins and 34 losses, placing them sixth in the Eastern Conference. Meanwhile, the Timberwolves have a record of 46 wins and 30 losses, ranking sixth in the Western Conference.

data.title: Jack Dorsey Suggests Return of Bitcoin Faucet, Sparking Renewed Interest
data.description: Jack Dorsey has suggested the potential return of a Bitcoin faucet, a tool that distributes small amounts of BTC to users for completing simple tasks. According to NS3.AI, this announcement has reignited interest in the concept, although Block has yet to reveal details regarding the distribution size, usage limits, or whether the payouts will utilize the Lightning Network.
